steps.title: Identify the tense signal
steps.content: The first example uses “connects” (simple present) to describe what character Bình does in The Book of Salt. This establishes the tense pattern for how events in Truong's novels should be described.

steps.title: Match the verb tense
steps.content: Choice C “experiences” uses simple present, matching “connects” and maintaining consistent tense across both examples. Choices A and B use past tense, D uses future tense—all three violate this consistency. That matches choice C — C is correct.
